scope.summary: Define GarmentBlock and BlockBox type-contract so pattern groups sewn to a declared interface type are interchangeable across garments (MD Block system parity)
acceptance_criteria: GarmentBlock type exists with block_id (BLK-{uuid_v7}), block_box_type TEXT (the interface discriminant), a GarmentSpec panel subset, and declared seam attachment anchors
tailor_garment_blocks migration creates the authority table with PK BLK-, workspace_id, block_box_type CHECK, spec_json JSONB, and event_ledger_event_id FK

Two blocks with the same block_box_type can be swapped into a parent garment by replacing the panel subset and re-wiring seams at the declared anchors, producing a valid GarmentSpec that passes PANEL_CLOSED and SEAM_LENGTH_MATCH validators
The tailor_block_swap MCP tool accepts garment_id and replacement block_id, validates block_box_type compatibility, and emits TailorGarmentDraftProposed for the composed result
Block swap that attempts to replace a block with a mismatched block_box_type returns InvalidSpec typed error without touching the authority row
TailorGarmentBlockRecorded KernelEventType variant is emitted on block creation and is replayable
Integration test: compose a bodice from a torso block + sleeve block of matching types; swap the sleeve block for a different sleeve variant; both composed specs pass PANEL_CLOSED + SEAM_LENGTH_MATCH
proof_targets: HBR-INT: EventLedger replay reconstructs block composition from durable state
scope.risk_if_missed: Without the Block Box type-contract there is no composable modular garment system; every style variation requires authoring a complete new garment from scratch, which defeats the reusable library value and makes the Tailor authoring model significantly less expressive than MD's mix-and-match modular workflow.

risks: Broad MT scope can hide multiple review targets.
Markdown MT lists may disagree with packet-declared active/next MT truth.
Receipt routing may target an old MT if contract identity is omitted.
minimum_controls: Exactly one primary proof target per MT unless the packet records why not.
MT identity must be stable and referenced by receipt correlation.
Generated projection drift must not wake Coder or Validator by itself.
